emails.subject: Energy Services, Inc.
emails.body: Energy Services, Inc. 509402. Can you see if this is the correct CP. We don't have a contract with them. If it is correct, that's fine, just let me know.

emails.subject: Re: Energy Services, Inc.
emails.body: Re: Energy Services, Inc. No, this was incorrect. I'll tell you something Real Time is having problems figuring out who they do and do not trade with. We're going to have a conversation about this in a minute when I come up for air from this whole California mess. In the meantime, I've changed this to Enron Energy Services, Inc. Thanks, Kate Rhonda L Denton 01/31/2001 11:32 AM
